biological_replicate: we used ESR1 ChIP-seq data from 40 female breast cancer patients
technical_replicate: Five newly generated ESR1 ChIPs on female tumors were added to this study.
experimental_design: female vs male breast cancer patients
we used an independent cohort of 30 ESR1+ male breast cancer patients as a validation cohort.
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
